summary: 11+ years of expert-level experience in frontend architecture and engineering excellence. I specialize in transforming fragmented development cycles into streamlined, automated pipelines. Beyond technical mastery, I excel in mentorship and technical governance, driving architectural decisions that minimize rollbacks and maximize scalability across mobile, web, and automotive platforms.
skills: NPM Component Library Design for Weboffice SDK, Contract Drafting Engines, Cross-platform H5 Bridges

bullets: Code Governance: Established company-wide frontend standards via custom ESLint configurations, ensuring 100% code consistency across multiple core projects.
Micro-frontend & SDKs: Designed a micro-frontend architecture using iframes and encapsulated a React-based NPM package for WPS WebOffice SDK, unifying document editing across the enterprise.
Testing Leadership: Built a comprehensive CI/CD-integrated testing suite with Jest and Playwright, significantly reducing regression bugs in the Intelligent Contract Review Platform.
Performance Expert: Successfully optimized first-screen load times by 85% (from 1400ms to 200ms) for high-traffic AI applications.
Workflow Automation: Integrated OpenAPI for automated code generation and documentation, reducing manual boilerplate development by 30%+.
Built a full-stack data intake-to-visualization pipeline for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) testing with measurable gains.
Platform interface design and code development.

Developed interactive Native API documentation for H5 pages to interface with mobile and in-car applications. By configuring Testin scripts for automated validation, we successfully reduced cross-version defects and minimized the need for rollbacks.
Developed ops dashboards for AD data, accelerating analyst workflows and insight depth.
Shipped client pages guiding on-road AD tasks, increasing data submissions and speeding model tuning.
Led a route-planning UI for field sales, trimming travel time and boosting adoption across teams.
Built a Three.js 3D smart park app and tuned rendering, cutting load time by 38%.
Delivered an interactive 3D mall map with turn-by-turn navigation to guide visitors.
Built React/React Native app pages for trip planning and social use, elevating UX and stability.
Delivered reusable UI modules for a high-traffic travel site, sustaining uptime during peak spikes.
Maintained and updated 3M international product pages and daily content.
Coordinated with overseas clients via email and tracked progress in Jira.
